name: Warrior of Rocky ice

sheet.name: Warrior of Rocky ice
sheet.background_story:
Warrior of Rocky Ice is a lone wanderer, a man haunted by a dark past. He once served the kingdom as a proud knight, but a tragedy befell him and he left the kingdom, seeking a new purpose.

He travels through treacherous lands, facing countless dangers. He is feared by some and respected by others, a dark and mysterious figure who wields his sword, "Rocky Ice", with a cold determination.

People whisper of his past and the battles he has fought, but few know the true story. He is the Warrior of Rocky Ice, a solitary figure, forever wandering the lands, searching for his next battle.
